sourceMovie.title: We Are Your Friends
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: We Are Your Friends works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and music blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Begin Again
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If We Are Your Friends clicked for you, Begin Again (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and music, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after We Are Your Friends?
faq.answer: Try Begin Again, Coyote Ugly, The High Note—each shares DNA with We Are Your Friends while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is We Are Your Friends?
faq.answer: We Are Your Friends (2015) is best described as Drama, Music, Romance, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is We Are Your Friends worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
